bsky.name: Anthony Michael Kreis
bsky.text:
Officers shooting a man, running away from law enforcement, who is not a target of law enforcement, and who poses no threat to law enforcement, is murder.

Federal officers do not have the power to commit summary executions because they are aggrieved.
